form.formComment: Placed at all starts this track and trip. Last start finished 5th over 730m at this track beaten 11 lengths (43.68) behind Lakeview Hunter in a Grade 5 on April 4. Has been racing well. Well placed here and looks a leading contender.

formComments.title: TAB

form.formComment: Good effort to win last start by 5.5 lengths over 500m at Bendigo in a handy (28.93), beating Wyong Knoxville. Key chance again.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Good effort to win last start by 5.5 lengths over 500m at Bendigo in a handy (28.93), beating Wyong Knoxville. Key chance again.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Went up with lids at box rise.

form.formComment: Charged out of the boxes with a strong early sectional but bumped into one better when runner up (34.88) at this track over 600m. Fought on last time. Right in the mix again.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Charged out of the boxes with a strong early sectional but bumped into one better when runner up (34.88) at this track over 600m. Fought on last time. Right in the mix again.

form.formComment: Returns from a three-and-a-half months spell and did win when last resuming, scoring in 34.57 over 600m at this track. In hot form and can measure up again.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Returns from a three-and-a-half months spell and did win when last resuming, scoring in 34.57 over 600m at this track. In hot form and can measure up again.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Contacted turning out of front straight.

form.formComment: Did a good job two starts back at Horsham to win by a neck in 27.69, beating Dynamite Eric. Last start finished 4th on April 1 over 545m at Ballarat behind Make Them Cry beaten 2.75 lengths (31.26) in a Grade 5. Hard to tip with any confidence.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Checked soon after start and lost ground.

form.formComment: Won two starts back at this track over 600m when well in the market then went for a spell of two-and-a-half weeks. Returned last start finished 6th over 515m at Sandown beaten 6 lengths (30.50) behind Flash Of Genius in a Grade 5 on March 23. Has claims on best form.

form.formComment: Last start finished last on March 25 over 600m at this track behind Zap Devere beaten 11 lengths (35.56) in a Grade 5. Tipped to improve sharply. Rates highly on best form.
